targets.expr:
topk(1, redis_server_up{cluster="$cluster", role="master", db="$db"}) 
by (redis, slots, node, status)

avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node) / avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node)

avg(
  (
    rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
    +
    rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
    +
    rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
  )
  /
  (
    rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
    +
    rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
    +
    rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*", proxy=~".*"}[$__rate_interval])
  )
) by (proxy, node, db)

panels.description:
Used Memory - For evictions master * 2
Sum Of shards - Total used memory slave + master

targets.expr:
sum by (db) (db_memory_limit_bytes{db="$db", cluster="$cluster"}) and (sum by (db) (
redis_server_used_memory{cluster="$cluster", role="master"}) * 3 > sum by (db) (db_memory_limit_bytes{db="$db", cluster="$cluster"}))

panels.title: Memory Utilization

targets.expr:
sum by (cluster, db) (
            rate(endpoint_read_requests{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) +
            rate(endpoint_write_requests{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) +
            rate(endpoint_other_requests{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])
        )

targets.legendFormat: connections rate per minute for db:$db - node: {{node}}
disconnections rate per minute for db:$db - node: {{node}}
Memory Usage Copy On Write - redis: {{redis}} role: {{role}}

targets.expr: (sum(max(redis_server_bigdb_disk{db="$db", cluster="$cluster",role="master"}) by (redis,db,cluster)) + sum(max(redis_server_bigdb_ram{db="$db", cluster="$cluster",role="master"} ) by (redis,db,cluster))) - sum(redis_server_db_keys{db="$db", cluster="$cluster",role="master"})

panels.description: Monitoring p99.9 latency trends over time using histogram buckets.
panels.title: p99.9 Latency (µs) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

panels.description: Monitoring p99 latency trends over time using histogram buckets.
panels.title: p99 Latency (µs) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

panels.description: Monitoring p50 latency trends over time using histogram buckets.
panels.title: p50 Latency (µs) Over Time [read, write, other requests]

targets.expr: sum by (db) (rate(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by (db)(rate(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by (db) (rate(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])) / (sum by (db)(rate(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses{role="master", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])))
max by (db,redis) (redis_server_master_repl_offset{cluster="$cluster", db="$db", role="master"}) - max by (db,redis) (redis_server_slave_offset{cluster="$cluster", db="$db", role="master"})

panels.description:
This panel show the number of times an AOF fsync caused delays in the main Redis thread (inducing latency); this can indicate that the disk is slow or overloaded
And the current size of AOF buffer

matcher.options: size of the AOF buffer over time

targets.legendFormat: avg number of times fsync has been delayed
size of the AOF buffer over time

panels.title: AOF To Replica/Primary Lag Monitoring
